title: The glass backbone: Why the Army's logistics will break in the next war
summary: This article analyzes the fragility of the U.S. Army's logistics network, which relies heavily on fragile, centralized digital infrastructure. It argues that in a near-peer conflict, adversaries will target this 'glass backbone' with cyber and electronic warfare, causing cascading failures. The piece calls for resilient, decentralized logistics systems to ensure operational continuity.
